description: This file defines a Flutter widget 'RecipeCard' for displaying recipe information in a stylized card format, including recipe title, category, description, favorite toggle, and an optional trailing menu.

classes.name: RecipeCard
classes.description: A StatelessWidget that renders a stylized card displaying recipe details including title, category, description, favorite status, and optional trailing menu.

classes.name: _MiniPill
classes.description: A private StatelessWidget that displays a small pill-shaped widget with an icon and text, used for displaying recipe metadata like category, cooking time, etc.

methods.name: build
methods.description: Builds the widget tree for the RecipeCard, laying out various components responsively based on available width.

methods.name: _MiniPill.build
methods.description: Builds the stylized pill widget with icon and label.
